query: SELECT eo.id, eo.orderNumber, eo.customerName, eo.status, eo.subtotal, eo.gstAmount, eo.totalAmount, eo.advancePaid, eo.balancePaid FROM event_orders eo WHERE eo.orderNumber = 'EVT-LEELA-HYD-001'; SELECT eoi.itemName, eoi.itemType, eoi.quantity, eoi.unitPrice, eoi.totalPrice FROM event_order_items eoi WHERE eoi.eventOrderId = 510001;
